top_signals.title: Private-Credit Defaults Match 2023 High in $300 Billion Index
top_signals.summary: The default rate among private-credit borrowers has reached the highest in the roughly three-year history of an index from Kroll Bond Rating Agency LLC, adding to signs of stress in the $1.8 trillion industry.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Potential liquidity or banking-system instability affecting financial conditions.

top_signals.title: Crypto PAC has $12M stake in Senate primary runoff as Alabama voters head to polls
top_signals.summary: Defend American Jobs reported spending $7.4 million on media to support Republican Barry Moore ahead of his May 20 Alabama primary, and an additional $4.7 million before Tuesday’s runoffs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
